{{Infobox character
| name = Varic Vallenar
| introduced = The Captain
| name = Varic Vallenar
| aliases = Captain Varic, Professor Varic Vallenar, Captain Varic Vallenar, Varic, Archmage Varic Vallenar, Captain Vallenar
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| titles = Archmage, Professor, Captain of The Last Horizon, Sixfold Archmage, Archmage of the Cosmic Path, Spellbinder
| abilities = telekinesis, levitation, water magic, Absolute Burial, elementalist, binding magic expert, summoned rabbits, sealing magic signatures, Aether manipulation, incantations to toss golden magic circles
| affiliations = Vallenar Corporation, Magic Tower, The Last Horizon
| introduced = The Captain
}}

''See also: [[Varic Vallenar Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Varic Vallenar is a highly accomplished human [[Archmage]] and the Captain of the [[Zenith]] Starship, known as [[The Last Horizon]]. A former heir to the [[Vallenar Corporation]], he maintains a complicated and often adversarial relationship with his father, [[Benri Vallenar]]. Varic is recognized as a formidable magical genius and a [[Union]]-certified [[Archmage]], possessing an extraordinary capacity for magic that some observers suggest includes multiple distinct styles or even the essence of several individuals within a single body. His magical expertise is particularly noted in the disciplines of sealing, [[binding]], and water magic. In his various roles, Varic has served as a professor at the [[Magic Tower]] and has been identified as a champion in combat arenas. As [[Captain of The Last Horizon]], he directs his crew and manages the ship's magical power core. His actions have frequently placed him at odds with galactic authorities, leading to accusations of aggression and placement on execution lists by the [[Galactic Union]]. Despite these conflicts, he has been credited as an unexpected hero in various military victories and has engaged in high-stakes diplomacy with various royal and galactic leaders.}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Varic Vallenar is a human [[Sixfold Archmage]] and former heir to the [[Vallenar Corporation]], characterized by his silver hair and dull silver eyes. After gaining the memories and magical training of five extra lives through a ritual involving the [[Aether]], he became an accomplished elementalist and [[binding]] magic expert who serves as an instructor at the [[Magic Tower]]. A former prize fighter on [[Visiria]], he now operates as a Captain and uses various tools such as the staff [[Eurias]], a Lightcaster, and a [[levitation ring]] to wield his powers. Working on behalf of the [[Vallenar Corporation]] to prevent the rise of a new [[Iron Legion]] King, he intends to save the galaxy and has been recognized as the [[Captain of The Last Horizon]]. Throughout his journey, he utilizes diverse abilities including telekinesis, summoning digital avatar rabbits, and even borrowing magic from a [[World Spirit]].}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Varic's full name is [[Varic Vallenar]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c1">''The Captain'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Varic is the son of [[Benri Vallenar]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c2">''The Captain'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Varic gained the results of five extra lives of magical training.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Varic gained memories along with magic.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Varic believes the [[Aether]] thought he needed to live six lives.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Varic possesses telekinesis.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Varic can levitate.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Varic wears a white jumpsuit.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Varic intends to save the galaxy.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Varic has dull silver eyes.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Varic Vallenar]] is the son of [[Benri Vallenar]] and has stolen a priceless magical artifact from him twice.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c3">''The Captain'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Varic is working on behalf of the [[Vallenar Corporation]] to stop the creation of a new [[Iron Legion]] King.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Varic Vallenar]] is a licensed [[Archmage]] and former heir to the [[Vallenar Corporation]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Varic Vallenar]] is a [[Professor]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c4">''The Captain'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Vallenar is the name of the protagonist.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Varic Vallenar]] is an [[Archmage]] mentioned in [[Subline]] news articles.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c6">''The Captain'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Varic Vallenar]] is a human with modified silver eyes and silver hair.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The console at the mountain's base identified [[Varic Vallenar]] as having access.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c8">''The Captain'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Varic Vallenar]] uses a wand to cast spells.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c14">''The Captain'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Varic Vallenar]] was a prize fighter on [[Visiria]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Varic Vallenar]] was trained in water magic by a fighter.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Varic Vallenar]] uses a wand and a staff named [[Eurias]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Varic Vallenar]] uses a [[levitation ring]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Varic Vallenar]] uses a Lightcaster.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Varic Vallenar]] can cast [[Absolute Burial]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Varic Vallenar]] uses a mantle for protection.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Varic Vallenar]] uses an overloaded shield amulet.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Varic Vallenar]] is the Captain.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c16">''The Captain'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Varic Vallenar]] is an accomplished wizard.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Varic Vallenar]] is a [[Union]]-certified [[Archmage]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c19">''The Captain'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Varic is someone who can put up barriers quickly.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c20">''The Captain'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Varic can use magic to alert [[Hives]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c21">''The Captain'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Professor]] Vallenar is an elementalist and a [[binding]] magic expert.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c22">''The Captain'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Varic's summoned rabbits act like war-hounds.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c23">''The Captain'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Varic's summoned rabbits have bodies that act like digital avatars.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Professor]] Vallenar is an instructor at the [[Magic Tower]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c24">''The Captain'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Varic Vallenar]] won a [[Zenith]] Starship.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c25">''The Captain'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Varic Vallenar]] is the owner of a ship that [[Omega]] intended to steal.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Varic is aboard [[Sola]]'s ship.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c28">''The Captain'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Varic is the son of [[Benri Vallenar]] and has been recognized as [[Captain of The Last Horizon]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c28" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Benri]] and Varic previously proved the [[Mirror of Silence]]'s capabilities together.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c28" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Varic is a person mentioned by [[Horizon]] and [[Sola]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c29">''The Captain'', chapter 29</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Varic's magic helped loosen the [[Titan]]'s grip on [[Raion]]'s mind.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c33">''The Captain'', chapter 33</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Varic is a wizard whose magic can be crushed by the [[Behemoth]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c34">''The Captain'', chapter 34</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Varic Vallenar]] is an [[Archmage]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c37">''The Captain'', chapter 37</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Varic Vallenar]] possesses an amulet on his neck that acts as a shield against plasma bolts.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c37" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Varic Vallenar]] can summon water that looks like lasers from between his fingers.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c37" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Varic had black-and-white copies of defensive emplacements.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c43">''The Captain'', chapter 43</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Varic is a [[Sixfold Archmage]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c45">''The Captain'', chapter 45</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Varic has seven versions of himself due to his ritual: five previous lives, the one lived before the ritual, and the one since.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c45" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Varic used magic borrowed from a [[World Spirit]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c47">''The Captain'', chapter 47</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Varic uses a staff that spreads life and water.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c47" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Varic can create copies of [[Sola]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c47" />}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Varic Vallenar is a human [[Archmage]] of the [[Cosmic Path]] and the captain of [[The Last Horizon]], hailing from the family that founded the [[Vallenar Corporation]]. Distinguished by his silver hair and eyes, this [[Archmage]] of [[binding]] possesses unique magic associated with water and sealing signatures. Having previously operated under the name [[Spellbinder]], he once saved [[Starhammer]]'s home and later attempted to seal [[Starhammer]] away, eventually engaging them in combat. Throughout his journey, Varic has faced death five times while attempting to prevent a bad ending, though Shyrax has prevented him from dying. After being attacked by [[Omega]] at the [[Magic Tower]], he was held as a prisoner in a white jumpsuit and orichalcum manacles, eventually regaining his magic despite claiming to only be able to use basic [[Aether manipulation]].}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Varic Vallenar]] is the [[Captain of The Last Horizon]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c3">''The Engineer'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Varic is an [[Archmage]] of [[binding]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c4">''The Engineer'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Varic Vallenar]] has silver eyes.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Varic is a captain.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Varic Vallenar]] is a human [[Archmage]] from the family that founded the [[Vallenar Corporation]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c8">''The Engineer'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Varic Vallenar]] is associated with water and sealing magic signatures.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c12">''The Engineer'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Varic's last name is Vallenar.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c20">''The Engineer'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Varic claims he has no memories of [[The Last Horizon]] and that this is his first life encountering the ship.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c21">''The Engineer'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Varic claims [[Horizon]] remodeled his favorite [[workshop]] based on his memories.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Varic's orange crystal is teardrop-shaped and resembles a kite shield.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Varic has attempted to stop a bad ending six times.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Varic failed and died in his first five attempts to stop the bad ending.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Varic is mentioned by [[Raion]] in relation to helping [[Jak]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c22">''The Engineer'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Varic Vallenar]] possesses a unique magic.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Varic Vallenar]] has silver hair and eyes.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c35">''The Engineer'', chapter 35</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Captain Vallenar is the captain of [[The Last Horizon]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c35" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Varic Vallenar]] was attacked by [[Omega]] at the [[Magic Tower]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c36">''The Engineer'', chapter 36</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Varic Vallenar]] has access to high-grade enchanted objects and a powerful staff.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c45">''The Engineer'', chapter 45</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Varic Vallenar]] would try to seal [[Starhammer]] away.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c45" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Varic Vallenar]] is a wizard who saved [[Starhammer]]'s home over a year ago.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c45" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Varic Vallenar]] carries a gun and a wand.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c45" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Varic Vallenar]] wears a blue hood and a shining holographic mask.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c45" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Varic Vallenar]] previously called himself [[Spellbinder]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c46">''The Engineer'', chapter 46</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Varic is an [[Archmage]] of the [[Cosmic Path]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c46" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Captain Vallenar is addressed by [[Starhammer]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c47">''The Engineer'', chapter 47</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Varic is fighting [[Starhammer]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c48">''The Engineer'', chapter 48</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Shyrax has not allowed [[Varic Vallenar]] to die.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c50">''The Engineer'', chapter 50</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Varic Vallenar]] is a prisoner wearing a white jumpsuit and enchanted golden manacles.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c51">''The Engineer'', chapter 51</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Varic Vallenar]] has regained his magic.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c51" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Varic Vallenar]] is wearing orichalcum manacles.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c51" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Varic Vallenar]] claims to only be able to use basic [[Aether manipulation]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c51" />}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Varic Vallenar, the son of [[Benri Vallenar]], is a wizard who wears an azure mantle for protection and possesses three eyes, including an ocular implant. Utilizing a wand and incantations, he can cast golden magic circles that reveal the locations of survivors through golden lights. Known to [[Doctor Cryce]] and addressed as Captain Vallenar, his voice once reached [[Sola]] through her helmet. He is [[Raion]]'s best friend from a previous life, and he even broadcasted footage of [[Raion]]'s combat into the galaxy.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Varic is a hooded figure with silver eyes and a wizard's mantle.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c6">''The Knight'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Varic can use incantations to toss golden magic circles.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Varic's golden magic circle allows a user to see gold lights indicating survivors in a colony section.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Varic is a character addressed by [[Doctor Cryce]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c9">''The Knight'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The narrator is addressed as Captain Vallenar.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c13">''The Knight'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Varic is a wizard who uses a mantle for protection.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c16">''The Knight'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Varic is a character [[Raion]] mentions to Ryzer.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c17">''The Knight'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Varic's voice came into [[Sola]]'s helmet.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c18">''The Knight'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Varic is the son of [[Benri Vallenar]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c21">''The Knight'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Varic Vallenar]] wears an azure wizard’s mantle.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c29">''The Knight'', chapter 29</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Varic Vallenar]] possesses an ocular implant.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c29" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Varic has three eyes.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c41">''The Knight'', chapter 41</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Varic uses a wand and magic.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c41" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Varic is [[Raion]]'s best friend from another life.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c44">''The Knight'', chapter 44</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Varic sent video of [[Raion]]'s fight into the galaxy.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c44" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Vallenar is a corporation.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c45">''The Knight'', chapter 45</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Benri]]'s surname is Vallenar.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c45" />}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Varic Vallenar is the [[Captain of The Last Horizon]] and a formidable [[Archmage]] specializing in sealing and [[binding]] magic. Known for his silver eyes that shine with a cold light, he wears a mantle, an amulet, and carries a Lightcaster. After attempting to track [[Benri]] to Fathom, Vallenar provided lessons and even tried to use a spell to duplicate [[Aila]]'s combat armor and gun. Throughout his career, he has been associated with the [[God’s Eye]] ritual and ordered attacks on the [[Zenith Blade]], leading [[Union]] representatives to decry his actions. Despite being a master of the [[Mirror of Silence]] who can protect minds with spells, he remains a controversial figure who has turned the galaxy against himself.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Varic Vallenar]] is the Captain and an [[Archmage of sealing and binding]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c1">''The Pilot'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Varic is someone who has turned the galaxy against himself.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c2">''The Pilot'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Varic is [[Benri]]'s son and is described as the most formidable wizard in the galaxy.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The Vice Chief recognizes the narrator as Captain Vallenar.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c4">''The Pilot'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Varic attempted to track [[Benri]] to Fathom.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c5">''The Pilot'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Captain Vallenar provides lessons.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c6">''The Pilot'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Varic attempted to duplicate [[Aila]]'s gun and combat armor using a spell.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14">''The Pilot'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The Captain's name is Vallenar.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c16">''The Pilot'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Varic was forcibly delayed.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c18">''The Pilot'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Varic is a master of the [[Mirror of Silence]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c22">''The Pilot'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Captain Vallenar may be unwilling to cooperate.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Varic is the [[Captain of The Last Horizon]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c24">''The Pilot'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Varic has a mantle.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Varic has an amulet.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Varic has a Lightcaster.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Union]] representatives decried the actions of Captain [[Varic Vallenar]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c26">''The Pilot'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Sealing magic is [[Professor]] Vallenar's specialty.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Professor]] Vallenar is addressed by [[Director Porellus]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Varic Vallenar]] is a person who can appear in homes without warning.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c27">''The Pilot'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Varic is a Captain who orders attacks on the [[Zenith Blade]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c29">''The Pilot'', chapter 29</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Varic is associated with the [[God’s Eye]] ritual.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c32">''The Pilot'', chapter 32</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Sola]] looks forward to seeing Varic suffer.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c32" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Varic is a character who spoke about [[Solstice]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c32" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Students of [[Varic Vallenar]] had their security status flagged following public revelations.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c34">''The Pilot'', chapter 34</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Benri]] has a contact for Varic on his console.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c39">''The Pilot'', chapter 39</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Varic Vallenar]] has silver eyes that shine with a cold light.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c43">''The Pilot'', chapter 43</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Aila Escalon]] entered Varic's private world.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c43" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Varic placed spells to protect [[Raion]]'s mind.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c46">''The Pilot'', chapter 46</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Varic might have a spell he hasn't shared.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c49">''The Pilot'', chapter 49</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|“Memories,” Varic said, and his voice was dry. “The magic came with memories.”<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c2" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|“Yeah. Apparently the Aether thought I needed to live six lives.”<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c2" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|“I’m going to save the galaxy, but I’ll probably just die trying.”<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c2" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|“Varic Vallenar, Union-certified Archmage.”<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c19" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|“Is this where you die, Sevenfold Archmage?” Wearily, I corrected her again. “Six. Just six.”<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c45" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
[[Category:Vallenar Corporation]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
